title: PLA Developing Stealth Drone Swarms for Boat Attacks on Taiwan
detail: SCMP analysis reveals China's Northern Theater Command is developing stealth drone swarm doctrine for asymmetric naval attacks on Taiwan, integrating unmanned aerial vehicles with fast-attack boat formations to overwhelm defenses. The approach aims to saturate Taiwan's coastal radar and interception systems using coordinated swarms of low-observable drones launched from surface vessels.

media.caption: PLA stealth drone swarm doctrine for naval attacks on Taiwan

title: Australia and Japan Sign $7B Warships Contract, Deepening Indo-Pacific Defense Ties
detail: Australia and Japan formally signed contracts for a $7 billion warships deal, marking a landmark deepening of Indo-Pacific defense cooperation amid growing regional security pressures from China's military buildup. The agreement covers joint naval vessel construction and reflects both nations' accelerating defense coordination under the Reciprocal Access Agreement framework.

media.caption: Australia and Japan sign $7 billion warships contract for Indo-Pacific defense cooperation
